metadata.description: Primary references for Playwright E2E testing: scope control, stable locators, flake control, CI sharding, MCP/AI automation, visual testing, and real device testing.

playwright_official_docs.name: Playwright Documentation - Intro
playwright_official_docs.description: Official documentation entry point and setup.

playwright_official_docs.name: Playwright - Best Practices
playwright_official_docs.description: High-signal guidance for stable tests and CI execution.

playwright_official_docs.name: Playwright - Locators
playwright_official_docs.description: Selector strategy (roles/labels/test IDs) and stability guidance.

playwright_official_docs.name: Playwright - Retries
playwright_official_docs.description: Retries and patterns for handling failures vs identifying flakes.

playwright_official_docs.name: Playwright - Sharding
playwright_official_docs.description: Sharding long-running suites across machines for CI economics.

playwright_official_docs.name: Playwright - Trace Viewer
playwright_official_docs.description: Debugging tool for triaging failures with traces, screenshots, and steps.

playwright_official_docs.name: Playwright - Browsers
playwright_official_docs.description: Bundled browsers vs stable channels (Chrome/Edge) and when to use them.

playwright_official_docs.name: Playwright - Continuous Integration
playwright_official_docs.description: CI configuration patterns and artifact capture.

playwright_official_docs.name: Playwright - Release Notes
playwright_official_docs.description: Latest features and breaking changes (v1.57+, Chrome for Testing, Speedboard).

mcp_ai_automation.name: Microsoft Playwright MCP
mcp_ai_automation.description: Official MCP server for AI-driven browser automation via accessibility tree (package: @playwright/mcp).

mcp_ai_automation.name: Playwright MCP Guide 2026
mcp_ai_automation.description: Third-party overview of Playwright MCP; verify against the official README before applying in production.

visual_testing.name: Chromatic - Playwright Integration
visual_testing.description: Visual regression testing with Chromatic for Playwright tests.

visual_testing.name: Percy - Playwright Integration
visual_testing.description: AI-powered visual testing with Percy by BrowserStack.

real_device_testing.name: BrowserStack - Playwright iOS
real_device_testing.description: Running Playwright on real iOS devices via BrowserStack.

real_device_testing.description: Playwright testing on real iOS devices with LambdaTest.
